steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the thickness of lead-208's neutron skin. The notes give one detail that directly does this: its neutron skin is approximately 0.28 trillionths of a millimeter thick.

steps.title: Choose the measured detail
steps.content: Choice B gives a general fact about atoms with excess neutrons. Choice C says lead-208 has a neutron skin but gives no thickness. Choice D identifies neutrons around the surface but omits the measurement. The choice with 0.28 trillionths of a millimeter directly emphasizes thickness. The answer is A.
